description: Extended ASP (clingo) run for OpenTitan 20-component cases. These runs used a longer timeout than the standard benchmark driver (which skips ASP at >10 components). ASP did not prove optimality on any OT profile; the times shown are wall-clock to best-found suboptimal solution.
platform: Intel Core i7-12700H, 32GB RAM, Windows 11, single P-core

results.note: ASP returned UNSAT/suboptimal; CP-SAT proves 1804 in 0.05s
ASP found feasible but suboptimal solution (4288 vs 3449)
ASP returned UNSAT/suboptimal; CP-SAT proves 1854 in 0.05s
